aas.name: Area Taunt
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 110 - Refresh Time: 0:05:00 - Ability Timer(s): 2. Area Taunt I, when activated, taunts all creatures within a 40 foot radius, placing you 100 points of hate higher than your opponents' previously most hated target. Requirements: level 25.

aas.name: Heroic Leap
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 2016 - Refresh Time: 0:00:30 - Ability Timer(s): 9. Heroic Leap I, when activated, causes you to leap approximately 10 feet in front of your target, attracting the attention of up to 8 opponents within a 40 foot radius of your target, increasing their hatred for you by 1250 points. Requirements: level 12.

aas.name: Innate Fighters Tenacity
aas.description: Grants the Warrior the ability to go into a frezy at low health, increasing critical strike chance, and also permanetly mitigate 5% of all incoming melee damage. Below 35% health, the warrior goes into a berserker frenzy, gaining increased chance to hit, and turns their critical attacks into criplling blows, which deal increased damage, and can stun the target. The warrior will remain in this state until their health reaches 45%. Requirements: level 1.

aas.name: Unbound Wrath
aas.description: This passive ability increases your melee critical hit damage by 10/20/30%. Requirements: level 12.

aas.name: War Cry
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 111 - Refresh Time: 0:36:00 - Ability Timer(s): 3. War Cry I, when activated, grants all group members within a 100 foot radius immunity to fear spells for 10 seconds. Requirements: level 25, Fear Resistance at level 3.

aas.name: Warrior's Endurance
aas.description: This passive ability increases your hit point regeneration by 1% per 6 seconds. Requirements: level 30. }
